---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something we should add or change
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's the problem
<!-- The pain point or use-case you're trying to address. Not "VROS should have X" — what does X solve? -->

## What you'd like to see
<!-- Concrete description of the change. -->

## Alternatives you've considered
<!-- Including "I just want this and have no opinion on the implementation" is a valid answer. -->

## Hardware / VR context
<!-- If the feature is hardware- or headset-specific, what setup is it for? -->
